## Highlights

- **D22 — Doc-authoring protocol.** When ginee authors your markdown (architecture doc, ADRs, CRs, READMEs, runbooks, scenarios, API docs), structure-over-prose is now **binding**, not aspirational. Default-shape map (tables / bullets / definitions) per doc class + 5 mandatory checks.
- **Discovered-linter integration.** Discovery records your markdown / prose linter (`markdownlint` / `vale` / `proselint` / `prettier-md`) under `local/index/commands.yaml § commands.lint.docs`; roles run it at Phase 5 / report-as-done. **No custom ginee lint** — never auto-installs anything.
- **6 paired bad / good examples** ship in `core/doc-authoring-examples.md` (component inventory · design properties · ADR rationale · runbook · API table · scenario).
- **Adopter scope** — forward-only. Legacy adopter docs are not retroactively rewritten. Style / tone / branding remain out-of-scope (the protocol governs *structure* only).

**Full Changelog:** https://github.com/kostiantyn-matsebora/ginee/compare/v0.4.0...v0.5.0
